title: 1985 Horsetooth Mini Classic, Boys 10 - 11, Stage 3/3 7 Lap Criterium

enrichment.summary: A 1985 youth cycling criterium race (Stage 3, Boys 10-11 class) filmed at Fort Collins, Colorado on June 2nd, 1985. The footage covers the start and early laps of a 7-lap race with minimal commentary.
enrichment.speaker: other

claims.subject: the race
claims.claim: This is the third race in the course of two of many class at Fort Collins, June 2nd, 1985.
